description: §18.10 — a value-form `match` whose arms are plain `.Variant` patterns with NO guard clause SHALL NOT fire E-SYNTAX-011. Acceptance sibling of e-syntax-011-guard-clause-pos: proves the guard detector does not over-fire on ordinary variant patterns.
rationale: §18.10: plain arm patterns without a `| cond` / `if cond` guard are the supported v1 form, so the guard-clause check is correctly silent.
